title: chrysanthemum umbelliferum
intro: Chrysanthemum umbelliferum, also known as the button chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the aster family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant contains compounds like flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, contributing to its health benefits. Chrysanthemum umbelliferum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine.
